content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `origin/master..HEAD`, including `src/adapters/worktree.rs`, `src/contexts/automation_runtime/watcher.rs`, `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs`, and the added CLI/unit coverage. I did not find a correctness, safety, or robustness issue in the submitted changes. Targeted bootstrap/daemon/rollback tests passed and `cargo fmt --check` passed; I did not let the full `cargo test --features test-stub` suite run to completion because the long-running conformance portion was still in progress when I stopped it.

## Amendments

None.
